languages.text: "Воск еще теплый. Вы должны мне поверить, как бы безумно это ни звучало".

traits.locale_text: "Воск еще теплый. Вы должны мне поверить, как бы безумно это ни звучало".

languages.text: "The wax is still warm. You must believe me, no matter how crazy it sounds."
languages.original_text: "Воск еще теплый. Вы должны мне поверить, как бы безумно это ни звучало".

traits.locale_text: "The wax is still warm. You must believe me, no matter how crazy it sounds."
"The wax is still warm. You must believe me, no matter how crazy it sounds."
"The wax is still warm. You must believe me, no matter how crazy it sounds."

languages.text: “蜡烛仍有余温。你一定要相信我，不管这听起来有多荒唐。”
languages.original_text: "The wax is still warm. You must believe me, no matter how crazy it sounds."

traits.locale_text: “蜡烛仍有余温。你一定要相信我，不管这听起来有多荒唐。”

languages.text: « La cire est encore chaude. Vous devez me croire, aussi fou que cela puisse paraître. »
languages.original_text: "The wax is still warm. You must believe me, no matter how crazy it sounds."

traits.locale_text: « La cire est encore chaude. Vous devez me croire, aussi fou que cela puisse paraître. »

languages.text: "Bal mumu hâlâ sıcak. Duydukların ne kadar delice gelse de bana inanmak zorundasın."
languages.original_text: "The wax is still warm. You must believe me, no matter how crazy it sounds."

traits.locale_text: "Bal mumu hâlâ sıcak. Duydukların ne kadar delice gelse de bana inanmak zorundasın."

languages.text: «La cera aún está caliente. Debe creerme, por ridículo que parezca».
languages.original_text: "The wax is still warm. You must believe me, no matter how crazy it sounds."

traits.locale_text: «La cera aún está caliente. Debe creerme, por ridículo que parezca».

languages.text: "Das Wachs ist noch warm. Ihr müsst mir glauben, egal, wie verrückt es klingt."
languages.original_text: "The wax is still warm. You must believe me, no matter how crazy it sounds."

traits.locale_text: "Das Wachs ist noch warm. Ihr müsst mir glauben, egal, wie verrückt es klingt."

languages.text: 「ロウはまだ温かい。どんなに狂った話に思えても、信じてくれ。」
languages.original_text: "The wax is still warm. You must believe me, no matter how crazy it sounds."

traits.locale_text: 「ロウはまだ温かい。どんなに狂った話に思えても、信じてくれ。」
